trades.reasoning: Top scorer at 95 with RSI 63.2 in the ideal bullish momentum zone, confirmed MACD crossover, price well above SMA-20, and a volume surge — all signals aligning at once with manageable overbought risk.
Score 90 with RSI 59 leaves room to run before overbought territory, MACD bullish crossover confirmed, and price holding above SMA-20 in a neutral-to-positive tape.

decisions.briefing: Markets posted modest gains today with the S&P 500 up 0.4% and NASDAQ up 0.2% — a calm, neutral session that favors disciplined momentum entries. We have 4 open slots and $843 in cash, so the priority is deploying into the highest-conviction setups before letting cash sit idle. UTI leads the screener at score 95 with every key signal firing (RSI in the sweet spot, MACD crossover, volume surge), and TSLA at score 90 offers a large-cap momentum play with RSI still well below overbought levels.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities edged higher in a quiet session, with the S&P 500 gaining 0.4% and the NASDAQ rising 0.2%, reflecting a broadly neutral market tone with no dramatic macro catalysts. Sector rotation continued to favor cyclicals and technology names that had lagged the recent rally, as investors sifted through earnings signals and easing trade-tension headlines. The muted gains suggest the market is in a consolidation phase after recent volatility — neither aggressively risk-on nor risk-off.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日小幅收漲，標普500上揚0.4%，那指微升0.2%，整體市況偏中性，缺乏明顯宏觀催化劑。市場資金持續輪動至近期表現落後的週期股與科技板塊，投資者在消化最新財報訊號與貿易緊張局勢緩和的消息。盤面淡靜顯示市場正處於近期波動後的整固階段，既非全面進取，亦非明顯避險。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy that buys stocks showing strong recent price and volume trends, betting that what's been going up will continue to go up — at least in the short term. Indicators like RSI (Relative Strength Index) and MACD help identify when a stock is in a 'bullish momentum zone' without yet being dangerously overbought. Today's top picks (UTI, TSLA) were selected because their momentum signals are strong but not yet stretched — the sweet spot for momentum entries.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入近期價格與成交量均呈強勁上升趨勢的股票，押注強者恆強——至少在短期內如此。RSI（相對強弱指數）與MACD等技術指標有助於判斷股票是否處於「看漲動能區間」，同時避開已過度超買的危險水位。今日精選標的（UTI、TSLA）的動能訊號強勁但尚未過熱，正是動能策略入場的黃金甜蜜點。
